title: brugmansia cornigera
intro: Brugmansia cornigera is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the Horned Angel's Trumpet due to its distinctive horn-like protrusions on its flowers. Traditionally, Brugmansia cornigera has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Brugmansia cornigera include its ability to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Brugmansia cornigera is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used in potpourri and perfumes.
